# Real damage-model fixtures

These are minimal snapshots of the structures produced by the project's hero JSON export. They retain only the hero, health, ability, and damage fields exercised by `test_real_damage_model.py`.

Keeping the snapshots here makes the tests deterministic and independent of the ignored generated output under `site/public/data/`. Update a snapshot when the corresponding exported structure intentionally changes; do not replace this directory with the complete generated site data.
